title: VamPan - More Crafting
body:
![Logo_Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ff6ee72ab7acf39cfe2637c48eceedf81415e7e.png)

![Main image of the crafting tables](https://i.postimg.cc/4J6KBLnC/image-1.png)

**Hello there, fellow Minecrafter!**
I am **VamPanMC**, a rather old soul — a few thousand years, give or take. You might notice I’m not your average creature of the night… I’m a vampire–panda hybrid. Quite the rare species, I know. Don’t worry, though — I’ve already fed, so your neck is safe… for now.

In my long, long life, I’ve seen history unfold in many worlds. I even spent some time observing the brilliant Nikola Tesla — fascinating human. He never knew I was there, but he did use a drop or two of my blood in his experiments. The world thinks he was obsessed with pigeons… but truth be told, he was far more interested in the power of vampirism.

During my years in the shadows, I studied the mysterious essence of Minecraft’s crafting tables. After countless attempts (and a few accidental explosions), I finally learned how to alter their very DNA. The result? Crafting tables that take on the traits of every plant in existence… and perhaps even more, one day.


```
35 Crafting tables in 1.21.1, 23 in 1.21..4/8
```
![Crafting Table Recipes](https://i.postimg.cc/vBDbyZsk/recipes.png)
    
  
So, dear Minecrafter, I bring you these crafting tables as a gift.
I can’t wait to see what clever builds you’ll create with them.


And for those of you brilliant tinkerers who build modpacks — yes, you may use my creations within them. Consider this my blessing. Spread the magic far and wide, little human.



But don’t let that make you careless, hmm? My kindness doesn’t make you immune to my appetite. One day, when the moon is full and I’m feeling just a bit peckish… well, let’s just say I might come looking for a snack.

Sleep tight, little human.
